title: Runtime Protection + Event Timeline + Compliance Calendar — Live Event Indexing
description: test_runtime_protection.py, test_security_event_timeline_engine.py, and test_compliance_calendar.py cluster together. Runtime protection events are logged but not indexed into the event timeline engine — the two engines have separate DBs with no cross-reference. Compliance calendar events are not linked to the evidence_collector scheduled evidence collection tasks.
missing: Runtime event → timeline indexing: when runtime_protection detects an attack, auto-publish a security_event_timeline entry with source=runtime_protection
Compliance calendar → evidence scheduler: when a compliance event is due, auto-trigger evidence_collector.collect_evidence() for the associated framework controls
Timeline search API: /api/v1/event-timeline/search?q=&from=&to= with full-text search across all timeline entries using SQLite FTS5
